prediction.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?particle ?particleLabel ?charge WHERE {
  ?particle wdt:P2200 ?charge .
  FILTER ( ?charge < 0 ) .
  ?particle wdt:P517 wd:Q11415 .
  ?particle wdt:P517 wd:Q11418 .
  ?particle wdt:P279 * / wdt:P279 * wd:Q6718 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?particle rdfs:label ?particleLabel FILTER ( LANG( ?particleLabel ) = "en" )
  }
}
ORDER BY ?particle

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?mountain ?elev WHERE {
  wd:Q5456 wdt:P610 ?mountain .
  ?mountain wdt:P2044 ?elev .
}
ORDER BY DESC ( ?elev )
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?color ?colorLabel WHERE {
  ?fruit wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q3314483 .
  ?fruit rdfs:label ?fruitLabel
  FILTER ( LANG( ?fruitLabel ) = "en" ) .
  ?color wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q1075 .
  FILTER ( STRSTARTS( STR( ?color ) , STR( wd: ) ) ) ?color rdfs:label ?colorLabel FILTER ( LANG( ?colorLabel ) = "en" ) .
  FILTER ( LCASE( STR( ?colorLabel ) ) = LCASE( STR( ?fruitLabel ) ) || STRSTARTS( LCASE( STR( ?colorLabel ) ) , CONCAT ( LCASE( STR( ?fruitLabel ) ) , " " ) ) || STRSTARTS( LCASE( STR( ?colorLabel ) ) , CONCAT ( LCASE( STR( ?fruitLabel ) ) , "-" ) ) || STRENDS( LCASE( STR( ?colorLabel ) ) , CONCAT ( " " , LCASE( STR( ?fruitLabel ) ) ) ) || STRENDS( LCASE( STR( ?colorLabel ) ) , CONCAT ( "-" , LCASE( STR( ?fruitLabel ) ) ) ) )
}
ORDER BY ?colorLabel

SELECT ?nothing WHERE {
}

PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?statement ?event ?time WHERE {
  wd:Q46239 p:P793 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P793 ?event .
  ?statement pq:P585 ?time .
}

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?edition ?date ( YEAR( ?date ) AS ?year ) ?winner WHERE {
  ?edition wdt:P31 wd:Q110288240 .
  ?edition wdt:P585 ?date .
  ?edition wdt:P1346 ?winner .
  FILTER ( ?date >= "1960-01-01T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime && ?date < "1961-01-01T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime )
}
LIMIT 10

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?pandemic ?start ?end ( YEAR( ?end ) - YEAR( ?start ) AS ?years ) WHERE {
  ?pandemic wdt:P31 wd:Q12184 .
  ?pandemic wdt:P580 ?start .
  ?pandemic wdt:P582 ?end .
}
ORDER BY DESC ( ?years )
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?neighbor ?neighborLabel ( COUNT( DISTINCT ?other ) AS ?borderCount ) WHERE {
  wd:Q117 wdt:P47 ?neighbor .
  ?neighbor wdt:P47 ?other .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?neighbor rdfs:label ?neighborLabel .
    FILTER ( LANG( ?neighborLabel ) = "en" )
  }
}
GROUP BY ?neighbor ?neighborLabel
ORDER BY DESC ( ?borderCount )
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?director1 ?director2 ( COUNT( DISTINCT ?film ) AS ?numFilms ) WHERE {
  ?film wdt:P57 ?director1 , ?director2 .
  FILTER ( ?director1 < ?director2 )
}
GROUP BY ?director1 ?director2
ORDER BY DESC ( ?numFilms )
LIMIT 10

PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?film ?ordinal ?label WHERE {
  ?film p:P179 ?seriesStmt .
  ?seriesStmt ps:P179 wd:Q98063049 ; pq:P1545 ?ordinal .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?film rdfs:label ?label FILTER ( LANG( ?label ) = "en" )
  }
}
ORDER BY xsd:integer ( ?ordinal )
LIMIT 2

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?series ?seriesLabel ( COUNT( DISTINCT ?game ) AS ?gameCount ) WHERE {
  ?series wdt:P31 wd:Q7058673 .
  ?game wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q7889 .
  ?game wdt:P179 ?series .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?series rdfs:label ?seriesLabel FILTER ( lang( ?seriesLabel ) = "en" )
  }
}
GROUP BY ?series ?seriesLabel
ORDER BY DESC ( ?gameCount )
LIMIT 5

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?person ?personLabel WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P106 wd:Q36180 .
  ?person wdt:P1412 wd:Q150 .
  ?person wdt:P1412 wd:Q13955 .
  ?person wdt:P1412 wd:Q5287 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person rdfs:label ?personLabel FILTER ( lang( ?personLabel ) = "en" )
  }
}
ORDER BY ?personLabel
LIMIT 200

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?contest ?year WHERE {
  ?contest wdt:P31 wd:Q202015 ; wdt:P1346 ?winningWork ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  ?participation wdt:P31 wd:Q35718073 ; wdt:P17 wd:Q142 ; wdt:P361 ?contest .
  BIND( YEAR( ?date ) AS ?year )
}
ORDER BY ?year

PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX psv: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?heightQuantity ?amount ?unit WHERE {
  wd:Q557933 p:P2048 ?heightStatement .
  ?heightStatement psv:P2048 ?heightQuantity .
  ?heightQuantity wikibase:quantityAmount ?amount ; wikibase:quantityUnit ?unit .
}
LIMIT 1

PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
ASK WHERE {
  wd:Q615 p:P54 ?st .
  ?st ps:P54 wd:Q7156 .
}

PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?person ?personLabel ?date WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P166 wd:Q28835 .
  ?person p:P166 ?awardStatement .
  ?awardStatement ps:P166 wd:Q28835 ; pq:P585 ?date .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person rdfs:label ?personLabel FILTER ( LANG( ?personLabel ) = "en" )
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC ( ?date )
LIMIT 4

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?party ?partyLabel ?inception WHERE {
  ?party wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q7278 .
  ?party wdt:P17 wd:Q115 .
  ?party wdt:P571 ?inception .
  FILTER ( ?inception >= "2000-01-01T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime ) .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?party rdfs:label ?partyLabel .
    FILTER ( LANG( ?partyLabel ) = "en" )
  }
}
ORDER BY ?inception

PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?person ?start WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P31 wd:Q5 ; wdt:P21 wd:Q6581072 ; p:P39 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P39 wd:Q466956 ; pq:P580 ?start .
}
ORDER BY ?start
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX psv: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?person ?personLabel ?height WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
  ?person p:P2048 ?heightStatement .
  ?heightStatement psv:P2048 ?heightValue .
  ?heightValue wikibase:quantityAmount ?heightRaw .
  ?heightValue wikibase:quantityUnit wd:Q11573 .
  BIND( xsd:decimal ( ?heightRaw ) AS ?height ) .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person rdfs:label ?personLabel FILTER ( lang( ?personLabel ) = "en" )
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC ( ?height )
LIMIT 1

PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?statement ?time WHERE {
  wd:Q264554 p:P575 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P575 ?time .
}

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
ASK WHERE {
  wd:Q38111 wdt:P569 ?dobLeo .
  wd:Q185140 wdt:P569 ?dobJoaquin .
  FILTER ( ?dobLeo < ?dobJoaquin )
}

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ( COUNT( DISTINCT ?country ) AS ?count ) WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q6256 .
  ?country wdt:P30 wd:Q48 .
  ?country wdt:P35 ?head .
  ?head wdt:P21 wd:Q6581072 .
}

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?person ?netWorth WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
  ?person p:P2218 ?st .
  ?st ps:P2218 ?netWorth .
}
ORDER BY DESC ( xsd:decimal ( ?netWorth ) )
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?animal ?char WHERE {
  ?animal wdt:P487 ?char .
  ?animal ( wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * ) wd:Q16521 .
  ?animal wdt:P171 * wd:Q729 .
}
ORDER BY ?animal

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
ASK WHERE {
  wd:Q60 wdt:P1082 ?nyPop .
  wd:Q956 wdt:P1082 ?bjPop .
  FILTER ( ?nyPop > ?bjPop )
}

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?mammal ?mammalLabel ?speed WHERE {
  ?mammal wdt:P31 wd:Q16521 .
  ?mammal wdt:P105 wd:Q7432 .
  ?mammal wdt:P171 * wd:Q7377 .
  ?mammal wdt:P2052 ?speed .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?mammal rdfs:label ?mammalLabel FILTER ( lang( ?mammalLabel ) = "en" )
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC ( ?speed )
LIMIT 1

PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?athlete ?athleteLabel ?time ?date WHERE {
  ?athlete wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
  ?athlete p:P1000 ?st .
  ?st ps:P1000 wd:Q929585 .
  ?st pq:P2781 ?time .
  ?st rdf:type wikibase:BestRank .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?st pq:P580 ?date .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?athlete rdfs:label ?athleteLabel FILTER ( LANG( ?athleteLabel ) = "en" )
  }
}

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?n ?value ( SAMPLE( ?nLabel ) AS ?label ) WHERE {
  ?n wdt:P1181 ?value .
  FILTER ( ?value < 100 ) ?n wdt:P31 wd:Q1486643 .
  ?n wdt:P31 ?polyType .
  ?polyType wdt:P279 * wd:Q836270 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?n rdfs:label ?nLabel FILTER ( LANG( ?nLabel ) = "en" )
  }
}
GROUP BY ?n ?value
ORDER BY ?value

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?planet ?disc WHERE {
  ?planet wdt:P31 wd:Q44559 ; wdt:P575 ?disc .
}
ORDER BY ?disc
LIMIT 1

PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?head WHERE {
  wd:Q36 p:P35 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P35 ?head .
  ?statement pq:P580 "2015-08-06T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime .
  ?statement pq:P582 "2025-08-06T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime .
}
LIMIT 5
